message:
style(tui): convert History search footer to styled_mode_footer

Replace the last RichText::raw() footer string in History search mode
with styled_mode_footer(), completing the migration so all footer paths
across all 12 view modes use consistent styled rendering with
footer_key/footer_hint/footer_sep tokens and box-drawing separators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
